hero_subtitle: The smartest platform for daily wage workers and employers. Connect, hire, and get the job done with trust and transparency.
role_worker_desc: Find daily wage jobs nearby. Plumbers, Painters, Masons, & more.
role_employer_desc: Post jobs and hire skilled workers in your local area.

how.subtitle: Whether you're looking for work or looking to hire, we make the process simple, transparent, and fast.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.desc: Sign up and list your skills to get noticed.

step2.title: Find Jobs Nearby
step2.desc: Browse active job listings in your local area with real-time wages.

step3.title: Apply & Get Hired
step3.desc: One-click apply. Get notified instantly when an employer accepts you.

step4.title: Earn Money
step4.desc: Complete the job and get paid directly by the employer.

step1.title: Post a Job
step1.desc: Describe your requirement: Role, Wage, Duration, and Location.

step2.title: Review Applicants
step2.desc: See profiles of skilled workers who apply to your job.

step3.title: Hire Instantly
step3.desc: Accept the best candidate. They get notified, and you get the work done.

login.terms: By logging in, you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
